name: Cheddar-Nut Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the shredded cheddar cheese, plain yogurt, tomato paste, and chopped garlic to a food processor.
2. Blend until fairly smooth.
3. Spoon the mixture into a bowl.
4. Stir in 1/3 cup toasted chopped walnuts.
5. Garnish with fresh parsley.
6. Serve with breadsticks.
